ddls:
CREATE TABLE "water_bodies" (
  "water_body_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water body */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the water body (e.g., lake, reservoir) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the water body */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of water body (e.g., lake, river, reservoir) */,
  "area" REAL /* Surface area of the water body in square kilometers */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of water in the water body (cubic kilometers) */,
  "average_depth" REAL /* Average depth of the water body (meters) */,
  "max_depth" REAL /* Maximum depth of the water body (meters) */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Numerical index representing the water quality */,
  "ecosystem_type" TEXT /* Type of ecosystem present in the water body (e.g., freshwater, marine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hydrological_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hydrological metric entry */,
  "water_body_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitored water body */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period being measured */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period being measured */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the measurement period */,
  "recovery_by" TEXT /* Date when recovery is expected to start */,
  "recovery_time" TEXT /* Expected recovery time after the drawdown */,
  "underwater_period" TEXT /* Duration for which the water body was underwater */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Percentage decrease in water level (drawdown) */,
  "water_quality_at_start" REAL /* Water quality index at the start of the measurement period */,
  "water_quality_at_end" REAL /* Water quality index at the end of the measurement period */,
  "precipitation_during_period" REAL /* Total precipitation during the measurement period (mm) */,
  "temperature_during_period" REAL /* Average temperature during the measurement period (Celsius) */,
  "inflow_volume" REAL /* Volume of water inflow during the measurement period (cubic meters) */,
  "outflow_volume" REAL /* Volume of water outflow during the measurement period (cubic meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hydrological_metrics_water_body_id FOREIGN KEY ("water_body_id") REFERENCES water_bodies ("water_body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project (USD) */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of funding sources */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "projects" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of project IDs the researcher is involved in */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Research specialization of the researcher (e.g., hydrology, ecology) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., satellite, sensor) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries regarding the data source */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is collected (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data source (percentage) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data source was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry log */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hydrological metric being logged */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for the entry */,
  "date_entered" TEXT /* Date when the data was entered */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data entry */,
  "entry_type" TEXT /* Type of data entry (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "entry_method" TEXT /* Method of data entry (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  "data_source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source (high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES hydrological_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "water_body_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitored water body */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data entry */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature on that date (in Celsius) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation on that date (in mm) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed during the day (m/s) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity during the day (percentage) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Average cloud cover during the day (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_water_body_id FOREIGN KEY ("water_body_id") REFERENCES water_bodies ("water_body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who accessed the system */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., data entry, researcher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the responsibilities of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object describing the permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the researcher */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., data update, system alert) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the notification (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "target_user" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is intended for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_target_user FOREIGN KEY ("target_user") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
